disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not eaten or drunk anything for about 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: When did she last eat or drink anything?
Has she been able to keep fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She hasn't touched food or a drink in two whole days — she just has no interest and no energy to make anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness described as crushing during the panic; reported as not brought on by exertion, not spreading to arm or jaw, without sweating
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest tightness — does it come on with walking or effort?
Does the chest feeling spread anywhere, and is there any sweating or breathlessness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a tight, crushing feeling in the middle of her chest when the panic hits. She says it isn't from moving around, it doesn't go into her arm or jaw, and she's not sweating with it — but it's frightening.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: She just keeps saying the panic is crushing her chest and she can't calm down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound social isolation — no regular family, friend or community contact for six months; withdrawn from social groups and church
trigger_question_examples: Who does she have around her day to day?
How connected is she to family, friends or community?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's completely on her own — no family, no friends dropping by, she stopped going to her groups and her church months ago. I'm the only one who checks on her.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Expresses feeling that nobody would care if she lived or died; screen for active thoughts, intent or a plan to end her life
trigger_question_examples: When you say nobody would care if you lived or died — have you had any thoughts of ending your life?
Do you have any plan or intention to harm yourself tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She feels utterly abandoned and empty and says nobody would care if she was gone, but when asked gently she says she has no actual plan to harm herself tonight — she's just frightened and exhausted.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: She goes quiet and tearful and says she just doesn't want to feel this alone any more.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not taken her regular blood-pressure or cholesterol tablets for over a week
trigger_question_examples: Has she been taking her usual tablets?
When did she last take her regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She hasn't taken her blood-pressure or cholesterol tablets for over a week — she just hasn't had the motivation.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive self-neglect and noticeable unintentional weight loss with poor nutrition over recent months
trigger_question_examples: How has her eating and self-care been over the last few months?
Has she lost weight or stopped looking after herself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's lost weight and stopped cooking properly for months — the fridge only has spoiled food in it and she's not keeping herself clean.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Able to hold a clear, coherent, logical conversation and knows the day, place and who she is — no new confusion when talking
trigger_question_examples: Does she seem confused or muddled, or is she thinking clearly?
Does she know what day it is and where she is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's very upset but she's making complete sense — she knows exactly where she is and what day it is, she's not confused.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, shivers, cough or burning on passing urine reported
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, shivering, cough or burning when she passes urine?
Any signs of an infection over the last few days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shivers that I've seen, no cough, and she hasn't mentioned any burning when she goes to the toilet.
